name: Barnes Dennig
description: Offers fraud detection and forensic accounting services using accounting, audit, and investigative methods by Certified Fraud Examiners.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Friendly, compassionate, knowledgeable, professional, accurate, supportive partner.
Their dedication, expertise, and client-centered approach set them apart as a leader.
They answer every question quickly and with expertise that is impressive.
I highly recommend Barnes Dennig as a top-tier accounting firm that is completely reliable.

sentiment.summary: Barnes Dennig has an exceptional reputation as a highly professional, responsive, and trustworthy firm that delivers expert guidance while building strong personal relationships with clients.

name: Ohio Forensic Solutions
description: Forensic accounting firm led by Heather Deskins, specializing in uncovering accounting evidence for personal and business cases, including business valuation and services related to divorce.

name: Powers Forensic Accounting, LLC
description: Specializes in fraud detection, business damages, wrongful death, injury or termination, and divorce; offers litigation support with team of CPAs, CFEs, CFFs, and CVA.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: She unraveled the ownership and receivables confusion and did an analysis of the compensation
I was very pleased that Ms. Powers both saw and understood my dilemma
I most heartily recommend Ms. Powers and her company for her work

sentiment.summary: Ms. Powers receives exceptional praise for her forensic accounting expertise, professionalism, and ability to resolve complex financial disputes efficiently while remaining cost-conscious.
